rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BISHOP COHEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice, Demurrer To Petition For Orders For Issuance Of A Citation, Requiring Examination And Accounting Regarding Property Of The Estate Etc. For Orders Establishing Estates Ownership Of Property And Directing Its Transfer To Estate And For Double Damages, Motion To Strike Entire Petition
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer and motion to strike are both overruled. The general demurrer is overruled because each of the four claims state cognizable causes of action. The special demurrers are also overruled because the petition is not ambiguous and because petitioner has standing to pursue the section 850 and 859 claims and the section 8770 claims. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than September 8, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
